overview.short: Shri Digamber Jain Atishya Kshetra Mandir, Sanghiji is an ancient Jain Temple in Sanganer, Rajasthan made of red stone.
overview.description: Shri Digamber Jain Atishya Kshetra Mandir, Sanghiji is an ancient Jain Temple in Sanganer, Rajasthan made of red stone. The ancient Shri Digamber Jain temple of Sanganer is 16 km from Jaipur.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Circle
topPlaces.description: The Jawahar Circle is a garden traffic circle and heavily trafficked intersection in the city of Jaipur, India built by the Jaipur Development Authority.

topPlaces.name: Pratap Nagar, Jaipur
topPlaces.description: Pratap Nagar is one of the largest residential areas in Jaipur, India. It is located on NH 12 (locally known as Tonk Road).

topPlaces.name: Sanganer
topPlaces.description: Sanganer is a town, or tehsil, situated in Jaipur district, Rajasthan, 16 km south of state capital Jaipur. Jaipur is divided into 13 subdivisions, of which Sanganer is one.

topPlaces.name: World Trade Park, Jaipur
topPlaces.description: World Trade Park is a shopping mall in Malviya Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. It was officially opened in the later half of 2012.

topPlaces.name: City Park, Jaipur
topPlaces.description: City Park is a prominent urban park situated in Mansarovar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India built by the Rajasthan Housing Board. The park was inaugurated in October 2022.

topPlaces.name: ARCH Academy of Design
topPlaces.description: The ARCH College of Design and Business is a design College in Jaipur (Rajasthan), India. It was set up in 2000 under the management of the Arch Educational Society.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Jaipur
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Jaipur (Dioecesis Iaipurensis) in India was created on 20 July 2005, when the Diocese of Ajmer and Jaipur was split. It is a suffragan diocese of the Archdiocese of Agra.

topPlaces.name: Mansarovar (Jaipur)
topPlaces.description: Mansarovar is a large residential neighborhood located in the southwestern part of Jaipur, Rajasthan, India., India. Until 2010, it was the largest colony in Asia.

items.note: The Jawahar Circle is a garden traffic circle and heavily trafficked intersection in the city of Jaipur, India built by the Jaipur Development Authority.
Pratap Nagar is one of the largest residential areas in Jaipur, India. It is located on NH 12 (locally known as Tonk Road).
Sanganer is a town, or tehsil, situated in Jaipur district, Rajasthan, 16 km south of state capital Jaipur. Jaipur is divided into 13 subdivisions, of which Sanganer is one.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — World Trade Park, Jaipur & around

items.note: World Trade Park is a shopping mall in Malviya Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. It was officially opened in the later half of 2012.
City Park is a prominent urban park situated in Mansarovar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India built by the Rajasthan Housing Board. The park was inaugurated in October 2022.
The ARCH College of Design and Business is a design College in Jaipur (Rajasthan), India. It was set up in 2000 under the management of the Arch Educational Society.

The Roman Catholic Diocese of Jaipur (Dioecesis Iaipurensis) in India was created on 20 July 2005, when the Diocese of Ajmer and Jaipur was split. It is a suffragan diocese of the Archdiocese of Agra.
Mansarovar is a large residential neighborhood located in the southwestern part of Jaipur, Rajasthan, India., India. Until 2010, it was the largest colony in Asia.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sanghiji?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sanghiji is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sanghiji?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sanghiji at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sanghiji?
faq.a: Stays in Sanghiji start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sanghiji?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jawahar Circle, Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, Sanganer, World Trade Park, Jaipur, City Park, Jaipur.
